data.title: Citizens Against Government Waste Names New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani March 2026 Porker of the Month
data.description: In March 2026, Zohran Mamdani, the Democrat Mayor of New York City, was dubbed the Porker of the Month by Citizens Against Government Waste (CAGW) for advocating his socialist initiatives to residents. The organization accused him of wasteful spending and pushing his political agenda onto the public.

data.title: Cambridge Advances Advisor Continuity, Succession Strategy Through Acquisition of WealthPlanners, LLC
data.description: The recent acquisition further showcases Cambridge's dedication to advisor succession planning by actively participating as a buyer to ensure long-term continuity. Taking place in FAIRFIELD, Iowa on March 26, 2026, Cambridge Investment Research, Inc. ("Cambridge") highlights its position as one of the country's leading firms in this industry.

data.title: New benchmark shows AGI is far from reality. ARC-AGI-3 scored 0.37%, GPT-5.4 at 0.26%. Humans achieved perfect 100%.
data.description: During the week when Jensen Huang announced the achievement of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) by ARC-AGI-3, Gemini scored an increase of 0.37%. GPT-5.4 also saw growth, gaining 0.26%. Interestingly, human performance remained at 100% during this period, showcasing the diverse progress and developments in the field.

data.title: NEW YORK ANGELS APPOINTS PETER BODENHEIMER AS EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR
data.description: New York Angels (NYA) has recently named Peter Bodenheimer as its next Executive Director, as of March 26, 2026. Bodenheimer's extensive background includes over twenty years in building, investing in, and advising startups. His professional journey has seen him in various positions as a product leader, showcasing his wealth of experience and expertise in the field.

data.title: ICI Data Shows Retirement Assets Total $49.1 Trillion in Fourth Quarter 2025
data.description: As of December 31, 2025, retirement assets in the United States amounted to $49.1 trillion, representing a 2.1% increase from September and an 11.2% increase for the year. These retirement funds made up 34% of all household financial assets in the country by the end of the stated period.

data.title: Horizon Media Holdings Names Bhavana Smith Chief Operating Officer, Advancing AI-Led Transformation
data.description: Horizon Media Holdings has appointed Bhavana Smith as the Chief Operating Officer, signaling a shift towards becoming a growth partner rather than just a media agency. The newly created COO position highlights the company's changing leadership structure. This move comes as the organization aims to adapt to the evolving industry landscape.

data.title: Ondas Reloads With $1.5B Cash, Aggressive Deals And 100%+ Upside Target
data.description: Ondas Inc. (NASDAQ: ONDS) announced its highest-ever quarterly results, significantly improving its 2026 forecast while also receiving an analyst price target increase due to an ambitious expansion strategy involving mergers and acquisitions in defense and autonomous systems. In the fourth quarter, Ondas achieved a revenue of $30.1 million, surpassing the anticipated $27.6 million and displaying a remarkable 198% increase from the previous quarter and a remarkable 629% increase from the same period last year. The growth was largely driven by Ondas Autonomous Systems, which experienced a surge in sales of Optimus and Iron Drone products, as well as initial contributions from recent acquisitions. Gross profit reached $12.7 million, with a gross margin increase to 42% from 21% compared to the previous year. This improvement was attributed to a more favorable product mix in autonomous systems and enhanced fixed-cost absorption, despite escalated operating expenses due to rapid expansion efforts. The company reported a loss of 36 cents per share, with a widened GAAP net loss impacted in part by non-cash warrant marks. However, investors remained optimistic about the firm's growth trajectory.

data.title: Major General (Retired) Kimberly M. Colloton, U.S. Army, to join Blake Shiver of Procore for a Fireside Chat at the 2026 Building Innovation Conference
data.description: A special fireside chat will be hosted by the National Institute of Building Sciences featuring Major General (Retired) Kimberly M. Colloton and Blake Shiver, Vice President and General Manager of Procore Technologies' Public Sector division. This event is scheduled to take place on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Smithfield Foods Shares Rise After Strong Q4 Results
data.description: Smithfield Foods, Inc. saw a rise in its shares on Tuesday following the release of its fourth-quarter results, which exceeded expectations. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 83 cents, surpassing the consensus of 68 cents. Sales reached $4.227 billion, marking a 7.0% increase from the previous year and beating the expected $4.138 billion. Adjusted operating profit rose by 27.8% year-over-year to $402 million, while the adjusted operating margin increased to 9.5% from 8.0% in the same period last year. The adjusted EBITDA from continuing operations was $502 million, up from $402 million, and the adjusted EBITDA margin from continuing operations expanded to 11.9% from 10.2% in the year-ago quarter. As of December 28, 2025, the company had $3.837 billion in available liquidity, including $1.539 billion in cash and equivalents.

data.title: object studio’s Bella Loyalty Platform Integrates with Engaged Nation to Power Gamified Digital Engagement Journeys
data.description: The Bella Loyalty Platform, developed by object studio in Austin, Texas, has successfully integrated with Engaged Nation. This collaboration aims to enhance digital engagement journeys through gamification. The partnership is expected to significantly impact user engagement, with important numbers indicating a rise in customer satisfaction and interaction levels.

data.title: CFTC Chair Says Crypto Perpetuals Are Coming To The US 'In The Next Few Weeks'
data.description: CFTC Chairman Mike Selig is expected to approve perpetual futures contracts for cryptocurrency trading in the U.S. soon, after years of dominance by offshore exchanges like Binance. This move will reintroduce a popular trading product to American markets. The rise of crypto perpetual futures occurred around 2017-2018 due to U.S. regulators' reluctance to embrace the product despite its popularity. The key regulatory issue revolves around classifying perpetuals under the Commodity Exchange Act, which previously covered futures contracts and options, with swaps being added under Dodd-Frank. The debate centers on whether perpetuals can be considered "contracts for future delivery" because they lack a settlement date. This regulatory ambiguity led U.S. exchanges to develop alternatives such as Coinbase's 50-year futures contracts resembling perpetuals, albeit not technically perpetual. Selig stated, "We're going to fix that."

data.title: Five Reasons to Get Outside and Celebrate Trails This Spring
data.description: Rails to Trails Conservancy commemorates its 40th anniversary on Celebrate Trails Day, emphasizing the critical role of trails as vital infrastructure in communities across America. The organization, based in Washington, exhorts Americans to recognize the immense impact of trails.

data.title: Compact 6-Channel Piezo Driver for Piezo-Scanner Tubes and Multi-Axis Motion Devices
data.description: In SHREWSBURY, Massachusetts, as of March 26, 2026, PI Ceramic, a division of PI specializing in piezo design, has developed innovative technology to effectively manage a variety of piezoelectric devices like scanner tubes and shear actuators. Their solutions are engineered to provide reliable control in both dynamic and static scenarios. This comprehensive portfolio caters to diverse application needs and ensures optimal performance across different use cases.

data.title: XRP hits 2-week low; Ripple uses AI to improve ledger security with a red team that found new bugs.
data.description: Ripple has implemented AI-powered security testing for the XRP Ledger, utilizing an AI-supported red team that has discovered new vulnerabilities.

data.title: Isotec Security Offers Next-Level Performance with OPENGATE 2.0 and New Retrofit Solution
data.description: Isotec Security has launched OPENGATE 2.0, a new walk-through weapons detection system, promising improved stability, reduced nuisance alarms, and quicker screening. The enhanced features aim to provide a more efficient and user-friendly security experience. This upgraded version is now available in Westminster, Colo., with the release date being March 26, 2026. The system boasts advanced capabilities that lead to a better overall performance, creating a safer environment for users.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Drops As Trump's War Words Hit Stocks; Micron Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline on Thursday following warnings from President Trump urging Iran to prioritize negotiations for a peace agreement. This resulted in a surge in oil prices. In today's stock market, the Dow dropped as Trump's comments regarding potential conflicts impacted stock performance. Additionally, Micron Technology saw a decline in its stock value.

data.title: BUIDL, tokenized by Securitize, is now verified onchain by Chronicle Proof of Asset
data.description: In ZUG, Switzerland, it is announced that the BUIDL fund, tokenized by Securitize and supported by short-term U.S. Treasuries, repurchase agreements, and cash, has been verified by Chronicle Proof of Asset. The BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) fund, with $2.1 billion in assets under management (AUM), signifies a significant step in the institutional growth of tokenized money market products. This move showcases the transition from tokenized funds to data-rich financial instruments.

data.title: Reply Recognized as a Microsoft Frontier Partner for Enterprise AI Delivery
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] has been designated as a Microsoft Frontier Partner in the Microsoft AI Cloud Partner Program. This recognition comes in the form of earning the Frontier Partner Badge, which signifies their proficiency in providing AI-focused solutions across Cloud & AI Platforms, AI Business Solutions, and Security. The Frontier Partner badge is reserved for partners who exhibit advanced AI capabilities and satisfy stringent badge criteria at the moment of acknowledgment.
